title: Found Jar
card_text: You found a forgotten jar in the stash box. Collect 100 Bud Bucks.

title: Friend Paid Back
card_text: Your friend finally paid you back. Collect 50 Bud Bucks.

title: Group Snack Run
card_text: You covered the snack run. Pay 50 Bud Bucks.

title: Community Tip Jar
card_text: Collect 20 Bud Bucks from each player.
mechanical_effect: Each other player pays current player 20

title: Borrowed Lighter
card_text: Replace the lighter you borrowed. Pay 25 Bud Bucks.

title: Homegrown Gift
card_text: A grower blessed the table. Collect 75 Bud Bucks.

title: Trim Help
card_text: You helped trim and got paid. Collect 100 Bud Bucks.

title: Glass Accident
card_text: You broke the good piece. Pay 100 Bud Bucks.

title: Stash Swap
card_text: Trade one unbuilt property with another willing player or do nothing.
mechanical_effect: Optional mutual trade of unbuilt properties

title: Session Host
card_text: You hosted the session. Collect 25 Bud Bucks from each player.
mechanical_effect: Each other player pays current player 25

title: Too Loud
card_text: Noise complaint. Pay 50 Bud Bucks.

title: Free Trim Pass
card_text: Keep this card. Use it to leave Trim Jail once.
mechanical_effect: Player may leave Trim Jail once without paying

title: Lost Grinder
card_text: Buy a new grinder. Pay 30 Bud Bucks.

title: Pop-Up Market
card_text: Collect 150 Bud Bucks.

title: Stash Insurance
card_text: Collect 50 Bud Bucks for each complete color set you own.

title: Water Leak
card_text: Pay 40 Bud Bucks per Grow Tent you own.

title: Dispensary Bonus
card_text: Collect 100 Bud Bucks for each Dispensary you own.

title: Clean Bong Duty
card_text: Miss your next rent collection opportunity.
mechanical_effect: The next rent owed to this player is ignored once

title: Good Review
card_text: Collect 75 Bud Bucks.

title: Birthday Session
card_text: Every player gives you 10 Bud Bucks.
mechanical_effect: Each other player pays current player 10

title: Forgot The Grinder
card_text: Move back to the nearest Community Stash space and draw again.
mechanical_effect: Move backward to nearest Community Stash; draw card

title: Local Event
card_text: Collect 125 Bud Bucks.

title: Shared Harvest
card_text: Collect 25 Bud Bucks for each property you own.

title: Stash Tax
card_text: Pay 75 Bud Bucks.
